title: 150 Pcs Heavy Duty Black Plastic Cutlery Set 3 Sets of 50 Knives, Forks, Spoons Modern, Reusable, Lightweight Perfect for Parties, Outdoor, Picnic, Birthday, Camping
features: ✅ Food Safe and Versatile: BlissMart Cutlery is made from food-safe materials. Versatile and practical, this set is ideal for restaurants, catering services, or home use, meeting all your dining needs with ease and reliability.
✅ 150-Piece Cutlery Set: Includes 50 Black Knives, 50 Black Forks, and 50 Black Spoons. Perfect for serving multiple guests at parties, events, or family gatherings. So ADD TO CART NOW!
✅ Elegant Design: Suitable for any occasion, from casual gatherings to formal events, this stylish set seamlessly complements your decor and impresses your guests.
✅ Lightweight & Portable: Conveniently lightweight yet sturdy, this set is ideal for both indoor dining and outdoor activities like picnics or camping.

✅ Eco-Friendly and Reusable: Designed with the environment in mind, this cutlery set is reusable and easy to wash. By choosing BlissMart, you’re making an eco-friendly choice that helps reduce plastic waste, contributing to a greener planet.
description: Upgrade your dining experience with the BlissMart Heavy Duty Black Plastic Cutlery Set. This versatile set includes 50 knives, 50 forks, and 50 spoons, providing you with everything you need for any occasion. Made from strong and durable materials, our cutlery is designed to handle even the heartiest meals with ease. Lightweight and easy to use, this cutlery set is perfect for parties, outdoor events, picnics, and more. Each piece is washable and reusable, making it an eco-friendly choice that helps reduce waste. The polished black colour adds a touch of elegance to any setting, seamlessly blending with your decor. Our cutlery is food safe and crafted to the highest standards, ensuring you receive the best quality plastic forks, knives, and spoons. Whether you need a plastic fork, knife, spoon, or a complete set, BlissMart has you covered. Ideal for restaurants, catering, or home use, this cutlery set meets all your dining needs. Choose BlissMart for quality plastic cutlery that’s reliable, stylish, and environmentally conscious. Enjoy the convenience of our black plastic cutlery set, perfect for any gathering or everyday use. Make your next meal a breeze with BlissMart.
